TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Etdrick_Bohannon, title = Etdrick_Bohannon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Etdrick_Bohannon} }

S.FORM: Etdrick Bohannon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 5, Etdrick Bohannon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Etdrick Bohannon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 5, Etdrick Bohannon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: et*riʦ~ʨk βoħannon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, et*riʦ~ʨk βoħannon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
